title: Model guest auto-registration as part of Checkout, not a separate Authentication feature
context: prd.md lists 'Auto-registration from guest checkout' under both the Authentication module and the Checkout module's flow (UF-005). Modeling it twice would double-count effort and create a fake dependency cycle.
decision: F-011 (Multi-step checkout flow) owns auto-registration end-to-end. F-002 (core auth) provides the underlying account-creation primitives F-011 calls into.

title: Combine Midtrans Snap, webhook, and payment-status tracking into one Payment feature
context: prd.md's Payment module lists Snap integration, per-method support, webhook handling, status tracking, and idempotency as separate bullets, but technical-notes.md frames them as one PaymentProvider abstraction.
decision: Kept as a single feature (F-012) since splitting would fragment an interface that has to be built and tested as one unit (webhook signature verification directly gates status updates).
